meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Finish Projects Fast (Freelancer Checklist)
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS projects. Use this professional starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship your MVP faster than ever before.
content.answer_block: The root cause of project abandonment is 'Decision Paralysis.' By adopting a battle-tested SaaS starter kit, you eliminate the friction of boilerplate setup, database schema design, and authentication. Combine this with AI-driven execution via Antigravity and Claude Code to maintain momentum and ship production-ready code in days, not months.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank IDE again. The client’s deadline is looming, the architecture feels like a labyrinth, and the excitement of the initial idea has curdled into the familiar, paralyzing weight of 'not finished.' You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because you are reinventing the wheel on every single project.

Professional shipping is about systems, not heroic coding marathons. By integrating a standardized SaaS starter kit, you transform your workflow from a chaotic scramble into a repeatable, high-speed assembly line. It is time to stop building from scratch and start building for impact.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project using a battle-tested starter kit to ensure auth, billing, and database migrations are pre-configured.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the standard production-grade starter template including Supabase auth and Stripe integration.

steps.title: Define Schema & Business Logic
steps.description: Use AI to translate your client's requirements into a normalized database schema and type-safe backend services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with roles for Admin, User, and Billing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema for multi-tenant saas'

steps.title: Automated Frontend Assembly
steps.description: Rapidly construct UI components using your starter kit's design system to ensure visual consistency.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using the existing Tailwind components from the starter kit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create dashboard shell using existing ui components'

steps.title: Implement Critical Workflows
steps.description: Focus on the core value proposition by automating the creation of API endpoints and server-side logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server action for handling subscription upgrades via Stripe webhooks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add stripe webhook handler for subscription updates'

steps.title: Deploy & Validate
steps.description: Perform a final automated check for deployment readiness and push to your production environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for security vulnerabilities and prepare a production build command.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit code for security and prepare build'

pro_tips: Never build custom authentication; use a starter kit's pre-integrated OIDC provider to save 20+ hours.
Treat your starter kit as a 'living' repo—update it every time you finish a project to incorporate lessons learned.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests simultaneously with the features to prevent regression loops.
Standardize your environment variables across all projects to ensure instant local-to-production parity.
Prioritize 'Delete Code' over 'Add Code'—if a feature isn't essential for the MVP, strip it out immediately.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, document your custom utility functions into a private library to further accelerate your next client project.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting half-finished projects gather digital dust. Take control of your workflow, master your tools, and start delivering value that actually hits the market. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
